checks.message: OK  — [AC#1.a] decision == 'block' on Terraform open-S3 PR — got 'block'

OK  — [AC#3.g] pass comment surfaces iac_not_present evidence — got "## 🔒 IaC scan: **PASS** (no IaC files)\n\nNo Infrastructure-as-Code files in this PR's diff. Scanner short-circuited without invoking checkov / kube-score / conftest / docker-bench. `iac_files`: `[]`."

OK  — [AC#4.e] validator catches decision=PASS with findings — got ["schema_version '0.0.0' != '1.0.0'", "decision is 'pass' but findings is non-empty — must be 'block'", "finding 'f1' is HIGH/CRITICAL but decision is 'pass' — FORA-77 hard rule violated", 'evidence_audit_id is required (audit replay)', 'scanners_used must be non-empty when iac_not_present=False (no scanner ran)']

OK  — [AC#4.f] validator catches HIGH/PASS FORA-77 violation — got ["schema_version '0.0.0' != '1.0.0'", "decision is 'pass' but findings is non-empty — must be 'block'", "finding 'f1' is HIGH/CRITICAL but decision is 'pass' — FORA-77 hard rule violated", 'evidence_audit_id is required (audit replay)', 'scanners_used must be non-empty when iac_not_present=False (no scanner ran)']

OK  — [AC#4.g] validator catches iac_not_present=True with decision=BLOCK — got ["iac_not_present=True but decision is not 'pass' — the short-circuit must produce a pass", "decision is 'block' but findings is empty — must be 'pass'", 'evidence_audit_id is required (audit replay)']

OK  — [AC#4.h] validator catches iac_not_present=True with scanners_used — got ["iac_not_present=True but scanners_used is non-empty — got ['checkov']; the scanner must NOT have run when no IaC files are present (AC #3)", 'evidence_audit_id is required (audit replay)']
